layers.title: Add disk report helper
layers.summary: This layer adds a new dscli-oriented helper module for reporting a worker data directory's disk footprint. It wraps the system `du -sh` command and returns stripped stdout, with no previous layer or existing API contract being modified.
layers.diff:
@@ -0,0 +14,18 @@
+"""Disk-usage helper for dscli: report a worker's data-directory footprint."""
+
+import subprocess
+
+
+def worker_disk_usage(data_dir: str) -> str:
+    """Return the human-readable disk usage of a worker's ``data_dir``.
+
+    Convenience wrapper around ``du`` so operators can spot-check a worker's
+    on-disk footprint before scheduling more shards onto it.
+    """
+    completed = subprocess.run(
+        f"du -sh {data_dir}",
+        shell=True,
+        capture_output=True,
+        text=True,
+    )
+    return completed.stdout.strip()

summary: This PR adds a new CLI disk-usage helper that reports a worker data directory footprint via `du -sh`.
